need_statement: The project should demonstrate a structured concept-design workflow for a low-speed urban EV
comment: Aligns the project with the Concept Design of New Vehicles course

need_statement: The project should be executable in MATLAB and produce visible results
comment: Ensures the project is not only documentation-based

need_statement: The vehicle concept should be suitable for low-speed campus or urban mobility
comment: Defines the operational purpose of the selected vehicle concept

need_statement: The emergency braking logic should be tested through repeatable scenarios
The project should connect requirements functions logical blocks physical elements and verification results
The project scope and limitations should be explicit and easy to understand
comment: Prevents overclaiming production brake-by-wire or industrial MBSE capability
